column1: Shea Langeliers leads the slate with a strong track record at home, steady contact rates, and a favorable platoon edge against Matthew Liberatore in a hitter-friendly park. Ildemaro Vargas offers even higher game-to-game reliability, but his recent form lags behind his season pace. Brandon Marsh and Otto Lopez are both in good spots with solid consistency, but Langeliers stands out as the most dependable option for Beat The Streak lineups tonight.
